title: mnesithea thailandica
intro: Mnesithea thailandica, also known as Thai grass or Thai mint, is a type of tropical grass native to Thailand, belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Thai medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Mnesithea thailandica include its potential to alleviate symptoms of nausea and stomach upset, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Mnesithea thailandica are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
